name: WESTAMERICA BANCORPORATION
business: Westamerica Bancorporation provides a full range of banking services to individual and commercial customers in Northern and Central California through its subsidiary bank, Westamerica Bank. The company's strategic focus is on the banking needs of small businesses.

exposures.sentence: To a lesser extent, competitors include thrift and loans, mortgage brokerage companies, insurance companies and Internet-based fintech companies.
Climate change and the transition to renewable energy and a net zero emissions economy pose operational, commercial and regulatory risks.
